name: Reflection
description: Analyze conversation history after coding sessions to extract mistakes, misunderstandings, and positive patterns, then persist them as structured memories.
longDescription:
Post-session analysis that scans conversation history for **8 problem signals** (bug→fix cycles, multiple iterations, misunderstandings, wrong direction, communication friction, ambiguity, test failures, overlooked context) and **3 positive signals** (first-try successes, efficient communication, architectural decisions).

Routes each learning to the right memory scope — **project memory** for codebase-specific learnings, **home memory** (`~/.claude/memory/`) for cross-project patterns. Deduplicates against existing memories before writing. Detects recurring patterns (3+ occurrences) and recommends promoting them to `.claude/rules/`. Supports **manual mode** (present findings, confirm, then save) and **autonomous mode** (save directly via Stop hook).
